reviews.review_description: I joined and it takes ages to even walk towards one of the instructions, the guide on each instruction is also horrible, it is not clear one bit. If you're seeing this I recommend not even downloading it, and if anywhere you see the developers saying it's great, don't listen, they obviously put a few seconds of attention and effort into this and called it gold, even though it's closer to dirt. I'm am absolutely annoyed and filled with hatred, the video makes the game look fun and interesting, I would rather watch paint dry than play this.
Ignore all the 1 stars, it’s great. It’s in demo anyway, there’s no reason to hate.

I have to admit it’s a good game no major flaws just a few problems
It’s hard to understand the moves you have to do to get it to work so try to make that more clear and overall pls fix water it’s sucks

i hate this game it's literally a quiz just to put an element into your hot bar you can't do nothing this game is bad
do not buy it
Elements divided was waaaaayyyyyy BETTER
So people are just saying that it’s hard it’s not your just bad at it and u just skip the tutorial because you don’t want to listen or learn
I don’t know what everyone’s talking about how hard it is and it’s so hard to measure. I think it’s a great game and it takes practice to become a master, not a master, the avatar in my opinion. ￼

Annoying game, hard to master the abilities (I only managed half). I would give ten stars if you upgraded the control, you would make each element its own training area in an environment that suits it, where you fight against masters and monsters, and if you defeat them, you level up and get the ability for that attack, and at the beginning of the game you choose which element to start with and you play with and against real people of your level. It is also possible to make it really cool to get a monster puppy for the element you started the game with (say air, so a bird that when you grow up you can ride it) and in each element area you can replace it with an animal of that element. And so that the game would be difficult so that when you make an attack you will have to imitate that your chakra will rise back up and the stronger the attack, the more chakra will drop.
This game has very good elemental animations and is very fun. I love the gust animation. Just watch out for the fire elements cause you’ll get stuck.Also w aura and rizz for me right?

The hand movements on the tablets aren’t clear, and whenever I am able to decipher them, nothing happens.
I think it’s a good concept but needs a lot of work before hand.
This game is just not good at all
I cant even use most of the elements

Its a very good concept as, since watching Avatar the Last Airbender, I've had a great affinity for elemental powered VR games. Now does this specific game capture that? To an extent. You can battle against enemies, use different elements. However there are some not very good aspects of the game. From my time playing the game, the best element to play around with is earth. Water is a bit janky as when I tried using water arrow, it just bugged and left a string of water connected to both of my hands. With a lot of retouches, bug fixing, maybe adding sprinting and a better lobby, this would be a really fun game.

If the developers or developer is seeing this and have some advice I myself have made vr games before and I would like to say that you should make a youtube channel showing the development of your game and a discord server too I would also advise you to follow B.awesome gorilla tag tutorial for the multiplayer and for teleporting and servers so people can play with friends and you can have a tutorial room that you can go to at any point to remember mechanics and if you would like to get in contact with me for some ideas Go to my YouTube channel then to the discord the channel is called cyberinfinity studios
Despite being quite complicated, I loved the unique spellcasting system in this game. I just think it is very empty at the moment. Keep working on it mate and I'm sure you'll make a great game!
Can’t use power and the game is hard to understand
Difficult to get the hang of but is fun. Needs multiplayer, enemies, and some BGM

I think as a demo this is amazing shows off everything perfectly a few misspellings don’t matter I think the full game would be amazing and something I would pay money for and I hope the devs make a full game soon
This game is fun to play, but after a while I can see why it would get boring so in conclusion, maybe add some enemies, more maps, and multiplayer.

The gameplay is good except there’s no enemies to shoe at there’s no maps to explore so just two stars 😕 but if you added combat systems and collisions with swords and everything that would be epic also JK three stars
